cases.prompt: Onboard APIs in API Management to Microsoft Defender for APIs.

expect.label: Defender for APIs only sees APIs fronted by Azure API Management
Detection is not protection - pair with APIM policies for auth/rate limiting/validation
Prioritise externally exposed, sensitive-data, and unauthenticated APIs first

cases.prompt: Which APIs should I protect first with Defender for APIs?

expect.label: P0 - externally exposed + unauthenticated, or externally exposed + sensitive data
Rule of thumb: filter to externally exposed + sensitive data first

cases.prompt: Estimate the cost of Defender for APIs for high-traffic APIs.

expect.label: Pricing scales with API call volume
Use Azure Pricing Calculator before scaling
